hero.negativeSignalAudit: We are the only butt of the joke; USA fans get celebrated, Belgium backers get honesty. Nothing to mute.

hero.text:
Bet against my own country yesterday, lost the bet, and walked away happy about it.

Strangest sentence I've ever typed before coffee.

The wallets we track leaned Belgium, so the board leaned Belgium. The US didn't care. A 1.5-unit loss and easily the best L of the year. Everyone in my replies who said they were riding USA — you earned that one.

The rest of the card quietly went about its business: 4-3 last night, +5.7 units. Spain over Ronaldo at even money was the headline. +27 units since last Monday.

Today, same discipline:

Argentina ML -285 — 4 units, noon ET
Colombia ML +125 — 2.5 units, 4 PM. Same Colombia that cashed Friday's 6-unit max.

Both can move until they lock, 15 minutes before kick.

The board doesn't do patriotism. Sometimes that costs us 1.5 units. Sometimes it pays 27.
hero.rtLine: Bet against my own country yesterday, lost the bet, and walked away happy about it.
hero.selfReplyAt25min: For the new people from yesterday: we track a small group of bettors who win long-term and post where their money goes — even when it points somewhere uncomfortable. Every result stays graded on the board: nhlsavant.com/?ref=t0707a
hero.postWindow: 8:00-9:30 AM ET — morning coffee scroll; Argentina noon game gives it a natural 3h runway

gradePosts.argentinaWin:
Argentina handles it. ✅ 4 units at -285 isn't glamorous — it's just green.

Colombia +125 at 4 PM is the fun one. Same Colombia that cashed Friday's max.
gradePosts.argentinaLoss:
Argentina ML dies at noon and takes 4 units with it. Heavy favorites lose too — that's why the board sizes them, not us.

Colombia +125 at 4. The day isn't over.

replyNotes: @BullishonSports asked 'Is spain chalked then??' yesterday 2:25 PM — unanswered; a quick reply is a free community touch

doNotDo: Do not re-lead with the +54u/all-time number — week number (+27) is the fresh one
Do not blame anything for the Belgium loss — the happy-L is the brand moment
Re-run socialBoard before the noon Argentina post window if quoting consensus numbers
